testcase.name: test_tts_cache_control_human_sa

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 'public' in Cache-Control, got: 'no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate' assert 'public' in 'no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate'

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_audio_persistence_cache.py:60: in test_tts_cache_control_human_sa assert "public" in cc, f"Expected 'public' in Cache-Control, got: '{cc}'" E AssertionError: Expected 'public' in Cache-Control, got: 'no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate' E assert 'public' in 'no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate'

testcase.name: test_tts_cache_control_ai_num_1

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 'public' in Cache-Control for AI, got: 'no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate' assert 'public' in 'no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate'

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_audio_persistence_cache.py:68: in test_tts_cache_control_ai_num_1 assert "public" in cc, f"Expected 'public' in Cache-Control for AI, got: '{cc}'" E AssertionError: Expected 'public' in Cache-Control for AI, got: 'no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate' E assert 'public' in 'no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate'

testcase.name: test_tts_cache_control_max_age

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected max-age=86400 in Cache-Control, got: 'no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate' assert 'max-age=86400' in 'no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate'

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_audio_persistence_cache.py:76: in test_tts_cache_control_max_age assert "max-age=86400" in cc, f"Expected max-age=86400 in Cache-Control, got: '{cc}'" E AssertionError: Expected max-age=86400 in Cache-Control, got: 'no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate' E assert 'max-age=86400' in 'no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate'

testcase.name: test_tts_cache_control_immutable

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 'immutable' in Cache-Control, got: 'no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate' assert 'immutable' in 'no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate'

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_audio_persistence_cache.py:84: in test_tts_cache_control_immutable assert "immutable" in cc, f"Expected 'immutable' in Cache-Control, got: '{cc}'" E AssertionError: Expected 'immutable' in Cache-Control, got: 'no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate' E assert 'immutable' in 'no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate'

testcase.name: test_tts_cache_control_auto_type

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 'public' in Cache-Control for auto, got: 'no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate' assert 'public' in 'no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate'

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_audio_persistence_cache.py:92: in test_tts_cache_control_auto_type assert "public" in cc, f"Expected 'public' in Cache-Control for auto, got: '{cc}'" E AssertionError: Expected 'public' in Cache-Control for auto, got: 'no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate' E assert 'public' in 'no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate'
